# PII review plugin

This plugin packages the local PII review agent as a governed artifact for the webinar demo.

The governance point is the artifact shape, not this exact schema: reusable Copilot instructions should have ownership, versioning, examples, review expectations, and a distribution path.

## Demo talking points

- The same review guidance can start locally and become a managed plugin.
- Instructions, examples, and skills are executable process and should be versioned like code.
- This plugin is public-safe and must not be used with real customer, employee, incident, or internal policy data.
